---
title: '[Paper reivew] Demand Forecasting from Spatiotemporal Data with Graph Networks
  and Temporal-Guided Embedding'
author: Jiho Yeo
date: '2019-09-18'
slug: paper-reivew-demand-forecasting-from-spatiotemporal-data-with-graph-networks-and-temporal-guided-embedding
categories:
  - Paper review
  - Study
  - Time series analysis
  - Deep learning
tags:
  - deep learning
  - demand prediction
subtitle: ''
summary: ''
authors: []
lastmod: '2019-09-18T18:22:09+09:00'
featured: no
image:
  caption: ''
  focal_point: ''
  preview_only: no
projects: []
---

카카오에서 개발한 TGNet을 공부하고, domain 쪽에서 발전시킬 수 있는 방법을 생각해보고자 한다.
arXiv에 공개된 논문은 [여기](https://arxiv.org/abs/1905.10709)서 확인할 수 있고,
소스코드는 [github](https://github.com/LeeDoYup/TGNet-keras)를 통해 공개되어 있다.
